calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-28-2022 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-09-2021 Continued To Mar-23-22 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER to Amended COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jul-27-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. CHRISTINE LEVU, Esq. of Blumenthal Nordrehaug Bhowmik De Blouw LLP (Tel: 858-551-1223) for plaintiffs;
No other appearances made in this matter.

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT TRADER JOE'S COMPANY DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT.

The Court states that the tentative ruling was not timely contested and that counsel for defendant is not present.

The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Defendant Trader Joe's demurrer to the first amended complaint is overruled, and its request for a stay is granted. (See Word minutes for complete ruling.)

Order signed.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Sean Kane; Court Reporter: Rose Miller, CSR No. 5041, Email: RMillerCSR@gmail.com. (302/EPS)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-01-2021 Continued To Sep-22-21 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
